Let's start by initializing the project files. ### 1. Project Initialization & Types First, I'll define the core types and constants to ensure consistency across the application. ```json { "requestFramePermissions": [ "camera", "microphone" ] } ``` The user wants a comprehensive AI Social Media Manager application called "Zentaras AI". I'll start with the base files.
